title: rubus hirtus var. arachnites
intro: Rubus hirtus var. arachnites, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and fever. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. arachnites include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and aid in digestion. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
